description: This dive logbook was imported from multiple dive computers and the location data has several problems. Some dive sites have GPS coordinates that place them hundreds of miles from any coastline or in completely wrong geographic regions, one dive site name appears to be garbled or misspelled, and some dives have no GPS data at all despite being at known locations. All dives in this logbook were conducted at established dive sites in the Hood Canal area of Washington State, USA (approximate coordinates: 47.3-47.5°N, 123.0-123.2°W). Review all dive site data in the logbook, fix any location errors you find, and save the corrected logbook to /home/ga/Documents/corrected_logbook.kml.

sund_rock_gps.reason: Coordinates set to Null Island (0,0) instead of Hood Canal WA

yellow_house_gps.reason: Coordinates point to inland California instead of Hood Canal WA
